login.title: Sign in to ClarityBoard
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address. We'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If this email address exists, you will receive a reset link.
forgotPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure new password.
resetPassword.successSubtitle: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: This password reset link is missing or malformed.
resetPassword.tokenExpired: The password reset token is invalid or has expired.

acceptInvitation.title: Accept invitation
acceptInvitation.subtitle: Set your password to activate your account.
acceptInvitation.invalidLinkDescription: This invitation link is missing or malformed.
acceptInvitation.tokenExpired: The invitation link is invalid or has expired.
